message: Proposed root change telemetry-persistence as a thin vertical slice of the persistence layer (no HTTP routes — those are the dependent endpoint changes). Wrote 2 feature files: persist-telemetry-event.feature (atomic raw_events append + vehicle_current_state upsert via INSERT...ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE, env-based connection config) and concurrent-upsert-and-aggregate.feature (GROUP BY aggregate over vehicle_current_state, last-event-wins, 50-vehicle concurrency with no lost/double-counted upserts, counts sum to distinct vehicles). Wrote plan.md with Why/What Changes/Design/Tasks covering versioned migrations for raw_events + vehicle_current_state, persist_telemetry() and aggregate_fleet_state(), docker-compose.test.yml Postgres, and integration tests. Aligned with telemetry-architecture (DB-enforced concurrency, derived aggregate not materialized counter) and tech-stack (Python 3.14/uv/Postgres) standards. ratchet status: 2/2 artifacts complete. AI build log written to docs/ai-build-logs/ and index updated. No implementation performed.
